title: Ultimate War Forge/Fabric
description: A war modpack the has guns and nukes. Everything you need for war. Includes Guns, Nukes, New caves, and so much more. If you want to download the forge version instead of fabric go to the versions tab.
body: Need for war with the world, the Ultimate War modpack will be great for you. Ultimate war contatains so much fun things. Guns, Nukes, New caves, planes, and new matterials all that could help improve your war.
